case_title: CINDY STANLEY VS. GEMS UNLIMITED, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANLEY, CINDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEMS UNLIMITED, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA RITZ JEWELERS $41,876.31 PRINCIPAL, $3,969.97 INTEREST, $365.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $46,211.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
